title: MantisBT
description: MantisBT is an open source web-based bug and issue tracker that balances simplicity with powerful project and workflow management.
installation: Database is configured through the first-run web installer at /admin/install.php, NOT via env vars. To reach it, this template sets MANTIS_ENABLE_ADMIN=1 so the /admin directory is accessible; SET IT BACK TO 0 after setup for security. At install.php choose database type 'MySQL Improved (mysqli)' and enter: Hostname=mantisbt-mysql, Username=mantisbt, Password=mantisbt, Database name=mantisbt (these are template defaults from the mariadb add-on; rotate them). The default app admin login is administrator / root: change the password immediately after install. Persisted volumes hold config (/var/www/html/config) and custom files/uploads (/var/www/html/custom).
